name: Puliszka- Polenta with Feta Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil.
2. Add the cornmeal and cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until it reaches soft serve consistency.
3. Reduce heat to low and stir in butter until melted and incorporated.
4. Gradually add sour cream while stirring continuously until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
5. Stir in chopped feta cheese until just mixed in.
6. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
7. Serve warm, garnished with freshly chopped dill.
8. Optional: For additional flavor, top with fried onions (see note below).
Note: Fried onions are optional but can be made by slicing large onions into thin rings, frying them in hot oil until dark brown and crisp, then draining, seasoning, and sprinkling over the polenta before serving.
